name: WritersProof for Ghost
tagline: Prove your posts are human-written before you hit publish
description: WritersProof for Ghost provides cryptographic authorship attestation for blog posts, pages, and newsletters. As you write in the Ghost editor, WritersProof silently captures tamper-evident proof of your content creation process without storing actual content — only SHA-256 hashes. Each published post carries a verifiable evidence chain proving it was composed by a human author, not generated by AI. Readers, editors, and syndication partners can independently verify authorship through the WritersProof verification portal.
features: Automatic evidence capture during post composition in the Ghost editor
Per-post cryptographic attestation embedded as metadata on publish
Newsletter and email content attestation for subscriber trust
Verification badge integration for themes via Ghost helpers
Multi-author support with individual attestation per contributor
Dashboard showing attestation coverage across all published content
Bulk verification export for content syndication and licensing

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
